title: Live scoreboard & MFA
description: Added real-time live scoreboard with auto-refresh; introduced optional multi-factor authentication for accounts; improved challenge rating display; assorted minor bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: Security patch
description: Fixed XSS in challenge descriptions; tightened file-upload validation and max file size enforcement; improved session handling to prevent token reuse.

title: Registration & Email hotfix
description: Resolved intermittent registration failures; fixed verification email delivery and link expiry; clearer error messages on signup.

title: Teams & Private challenges
description: Introduced team invites and management UI; added private/challenge-by-invite option; challenge categories and tags for easier filtering; admin bulk-invite feature.

title: UI refresh + mobile
description: Major UI refresh for readability and navigation; full mobile-responsive layout and improved accessibility; added dark mode toggle and compact scoreboard view.

title: Scoring engine optimizations
description: Reduced scoreboard lag under high load; fixed race condition in point calculation; caching improvements for challenge metadata.

title: Hints & analytics
description: Added hint system (author-provided hints, hint cost option); hint purchase tracking and per-challenge hint analytics; UI for authors to manage hints.

title: Anti-cheat and rate limits
description: Implemented IP-rate limiting and automated suspicious-activity alerts; improved anti-cheat heuristics; UI for admins to review flagged accounts.

title: Announcements & API v1
description: Launched announcements/news feed for organizers; released public API v1 for read-only scoreboard and challenge metadata; webhook support for external integrations.

title: Challenge authoring improvements
description: Improved challenge upload workflow with preview and validation; support for YAML challenge import/export; author drafts and version history.

title: Platform rewrite
description: Major backend rewrite for scalability and reliability; added Single Sign-On (SSO) support (SAML/OIDC); dramatically faster page load times and reduced memory footprint.

title: Public beta launch
description: Initial public beta release: core CTF features (challenges, submissions, scoring, basic admin panel); known-issues dashboard and feedback channel enabled.
